description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The front features a large garage door, a driveway with a white van, and a small landscaped area with a tree and shrubs. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, with large glass panels providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a partially covered terrace or balcony with outdoor seating, and the landscaping continues with additional greenery. The roof is flat and appears to have skylights or rooftop access structures. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and rear areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a white van, main entry, and landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, terrace, and greenery along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, large windows, and a covered terrace or balcony area.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the garage, driveway, and the rear terrace with visible rooftop features.
attribute_window_arrangement: horizontal bands with large glass panels and asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a large garage door, minimal steps, no porch, and a landscaped approach with a tree and shrubs
